# Custom Waist Bag

Custom Waist Bag is a waist-bag-focused sourcing site for private-label buyers. It is operated by the production team shared by Tianjin Nameer International Trade Co., Ltd. and Tianjin Junyi Premium Trading Co., Ltd.

## Verified capabilities

- MOQ tiers from 50 pcs: 50 / 100 / 300 / 500 / 1,000 / 3,000+
- Samples in 7-15 days
- Bulk production in 15-30 days after approval
- Screen printing, embroidery, rubber patches, woven labels, private labels, heat transfer, leather patches, metal badges, custom zipper pulls and Pantone custom dyeing
- 3,000 sqm sewing workshop; 35 production staff and 15 sales and support staff

## Contact

- Anna Wei
